presentation.brandSurface: canonical-rich-deck-gradient on the left panel (rounded right corners)
presentation.brandLogo: efeonce negative wordmark under brandTitle — fixed brand asset, never content
presentation.bulletIcon: assets/star1.svg — fixed decorative marker per bullet, identical for every item, never content
presentation.typography: lead renders semibold (<b>) and description regular, both inside the same 28px text block
presentation.layout: bullets are distributed with space-between across the full column height; more than 7 items breaks the dashed separator rhythm
